rationale: The citing paper’s core design explicitly evaluates incentive-aligned WTP methods including ICBC/BDM against REAL purchase behavior, while the cited paper introduces a web-based upgrading method with BDM incentives and HB estimation for complex-product WTP elicitation. Given this strong methodological overlap, the citation is plausibly a method/foundation source rather than an incidental background mention, even though the matched evidence is only a DOI record.
